value.name: Situational Determinism Contract Valid
value.purpose: situational_determinism_contract is present with fail-closed resolution_order.
value.critical_rule: Execution branching must follow a declared deterministic resolution order.
value.failure_impact: Ambiguous situational resolution produces non-reproducible execution.

value.name: Governance Precedence Valid
value.purpose: governance_precedence declares a non-empty precedence_levels list.
value.critical_rule: Rule conflicts must be resolved by declared precedence, not implicit ordering.
value.failure_impact: Conflicting rules produce non-deterministic governance outcomes.

value.name: Executor Routing Policy Valid
value.purpose: executor_routing_policy provides a non-empty routing_rules list.
value.critical_rule: Executor selection must follow a declared, auditable routing contract.
value.failure_impact: Arbitrary executor selection breaks traceability and reproducibility.

value.name: Hermetic Step Contract Valid
value.purpose: hermetic_step_contract declares isolation_requirements for reproducible execution.
value.critical_rule: Steps must declare all inputs, outputs, and environment pins.
value.failure_impact: Undeclared dependencies cause irreproducible step outputs.

value.name: Decision Logging Policy Valid
value.purpose: decision_logging_policy specifies at least one log_targets path.
value.critical_rule: Every consequential decision must be logged for audit and replay.
value.failure_impact: Missing decision logs prevent post-hoc audit and debugging.

value.name: Durable Execution Contract Valid
value.purpose: durable_execution_contract declares a checkpoint_policy for resumable runs.
value.critical_rule: Executions must be resumable from verified checkpoints after failure.
value.failure_impact: Non-durable execution loses progress and breaks audit continuity.

value.name: Array Mutation Policy Valid
value.purpose: array_mutation_policy bans positional array-index edits and requires identity-key mutations.
value.critical_rule: Array mutations must use stable identity keys, never positional indexes.
value.failure_impact: Positional array edits silently corrupt documents when order changes.

value.name: Path Resolution Policy Valid
value.purpose: path_resolution_policy references a resolver script for governed path lookups.
value.critical_rule: Governed paths must be resolved through the declared resolver, never hardcoded.
value.failure_impact: Hardcoded paths break when the filesystem layout changes.

value.name: Canonical Document Resolution Valid
value.purpose: canonical_document_resolution names the authoritative V3_3 files.
value.critical_rule: Only the declared canonical filenames are authoritative sources of truth.
value.failure_impact: Ambiguous document identity causes divergent governance state.

value.name: Command Object Schema Valid
value.purpose: command_object_schema declares required fields for executable commands.
value.critical_rule: All executable commands must declare shell, cwd, timeout, failure mode, and evidence path.
value.failure_impact: Under-specified commands cannot be deterministically replayed or audited.

value.name: Pattern Resolution Policy Valid
value.purpose: pattern_resolution_policy provides approved_patterns with fail-closed fallback.
value.critical_rule: Tasks without an approved pattern must fail closed, not improvise execution.
value.failure_impact: Unapproved execution patterns bypass governance and audit controls.

value.name: Fallback Policy Valid
value.purpose: fallback_policy declares at least one authorized fallback outcome.
value.critical_rule: Fallback behavior must be pre-authorized; ad-hoc fallbacks are forbidden.
value.failure_impact: Unauthorized fallbacks produce unauditable and potentially unsafe outcomes.

value.name: Permission Tiers Valid
value.purpose: permission_tiers declares the four capability tiers.
value.critical_rule: Operations must be classified into a declared permission tier before execution.

value.name: Provenance Contract Valid
value.purpose: provenance_contract requires producer, sha256, and timestamp_utc on all outputs.
value.critical_rule: All artifact outputs must carry traceable provenance metadata.
value.failure_impact: Missing provenance breaks audit chains and prevents tamper detection.

value.name: Change Archival Policy Valid
value.purpose: change_archival_policy lists directories that must be archived before destructive changes.
value.critical_rule: Evidence and patch artifacts must be archived before any destructive operation.
value.failure_impact: Unarchived evidence cannot support rollback or compliance review.

value.name: Affected Execution Policy Valid
value.purpose: affected_execution_policy references a dependency graph for affected-only gate execution.
value.critical_rule: Selective gate execution must be driven by a declared dependency graph.
value.failure_impact: Arbitrary gate skipping misses required checks and invalidates the evidence chain.

value.name: Policy As Code Valid
value.purpose: policy_as_code declares a machine-evaluable policy_engine and policy_dir.
value.critical_rule: Acceptance rules must be expressed as machine-evaluable policies over structured input.
value.failure_impact: Prose-only acceptance rules cannot be mechanically enforced.

value.name: GitHub Enforcement Mapping Valid
value.purpose: github_enforcement_mapping declares merge_protection binding NPP gates to branch rules.
value.critical_rule: NPP validation must be bound to GitHub merge protection before PR merges.
value.failure_impact: Unbound gates allow merges that bypass governance checks.

value.name: Tool Context Generation Valid
value.purpose: tool_context_generation declares output_files generated from the NPP source of truth.
value.critical_rule: Tool context files must be generated from the NPP source of truth, not hand-authored.
value.failure_impact: Manually authored tool context diverges from the authoritative governance documents.
